events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need parse scenario: cotter pin omitted on castle nut in suspension/steering assembly, rough-complete, installed-defective. Decision must be fail because non-compliant/dangerous. Risk high/critical? Cotter pin omitted on castle nut can cause nut loosening, steering/suspension separation, critical safety. In automotive assembly quality gates, likely critical. But risk categories: low medium high critical. Cotter pin omission is a safety critical defect; choose critical. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Maybe also failed? Not failed, just defective. percent_complete: rough-complete maybe 80? value not asked, 0. sound_source default empty? Schema says component or source of sound when asked; not asked, use empty string. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty list, workable empty list. findings: cotter pin missing from castle nut; castle nut not secured per spec; potential for nut loosening/loss of steering/suspension component. actions: install correct cotter pin per OEM spec; inspect torque and alignment; rework affected units; verify quality gate. rationale: Cotter pin is required to prevent castle nut from backing off; omission is a critical safety defect. references: OEM assembly instructions, alignment specs, maybe SAE/ISO? Since reference material OEM, alignment specs. Could include "OEM suspension/steering assembly standard work" and "alignment specs". Need valid JSON only, no prose. Ensure decision fail.
